transcript: Speaker A (AI): कल कहाँ गए थे [Where did you go yesterday?] Speaker B (Human): I went to माल yesterday [I went to mall yesterday.] Speaker A (AI): माल? प्रोनन्सिएशन थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. कल क्या खाया? [Mall? Pronunciation is a bit off. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. What did you eat yesterday?] Speaker B (Human): I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat pizza.] Speaker A (AI): पीजा? नहीं Pizza! और बात कल की है इसलिए eat नहीं, ate. I ate pizza. ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Pizza? No, Pizza! And it's about yesterday, so not eat, ate. I ate pizza. Where do you catch the train from?] Speaker B (Human): I pick train from railway इस्टेशन। [I pick train from railway station.] Speaker A (AI): Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। ट्रेन उठाओगे? Catch मतलब पकड़ना। और इस्टेशन नहीं, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not istation, Station. I catch the train from the railway station.] Speaker B (Human): ओहो, मेरा प्रोनन्सिएशन वीक है। [Oh, my pronunciation is weak.] Speaker A (AI): कोई बात नहीं। AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem. Did you try AI Teacher?] Speaker B (Human): वो महंगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): बिल्कुल नहीं। नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B (Human): लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] Speaker A (AI): रोज सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough. Gradually you will become confident.] Speaker B (Human): वाओ, कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker A (AI): नीचे इंस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ। MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो, साइन अप करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में इम्प्रूवमेंट दिखने लगेगा। ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 में तीन दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [Press the install button below. Install MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Trial is for just ₹1 for three days. Start now.]

[No Pizza!] इसलिए eat नहीं [So not eat] ate! I ate pizza! I pick train from railway इस्टेशन। [railway station.] Pick मतलब उठाना। [Pick means to lift.] Catch मतलब पकड़ना [Catch means to catch] और इस्टेशन नहीं [and not istation] Station! I catch the train from the railway station AI Teacher ट्राई [AI Teacher try] किया क्या? [did you?] बिल्कुल नहीं। [Not at all.] क्लासेस से 7 गुना [7 times than classes] सस्ता है। इसलिए [cheaper. That's why] MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस [practice on] रोज सिर्फ 15-20 [daily only 15-20] मिनट प्रैक्टिस [minutes practice] काफी है। धीरे-धीरे [is enough. Gradually] नीचे इंस्टॉल [install below] का बटन दबाओ। MySivi [button press. summary: An AI robot avatar corrects a young man's English pronunciation and grammar mistakes during a video call. She introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily solution to improve English speaking skills. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app and try a 3-day trial for ₹1.
